headline_seed: How extreme heat is changing DC’s July Fourth weekend event plans - The Hill
draft_text:
D.C.'s July 4 fireworks — billed as the largest in city history at 850,000 shells — face a disputed start time: Mayor Bowser says 11 p.m.; Freedom 250 says 10:30. Heat index near 109°F. Axios and USA Today both covering the gap.

And that's the mews.
